_about: Bland-Altman (model KNEE angle vs UCO OptiTrack-derived 2D GT) and aggregate speed, reproduced on an NVIDIA GTX 1650 Ti. n_full/m_full use the naive side=r; n_auto uses dataset_2d.json-resolved side (ex03=left, ex07=right).
dataset: UCO Physical Rehabilitation (clips_mp4), subjects 0-26, exercises 03 & 07 (supine SLR), camera 2

n_auto._fps_note: fps measured under GPU contention with the dashboard; clean single-run speed is 52.5 fps (see n_full)
